name: cisterni
description: Tank monitoring system (PLC via Modbus → PostgreSQL → web dashboard)

scripts.setup: npm --prefix backend ci && npm --prefix frontend ci && npm --prefix frontend run build && node scripts/setup-wizard.mjs
scripts.update: git pull && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend start
scripts.start: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend start
